query: Ursula von der Leyen April 2025 EU defence investment plan official name budget amount
a_issues: Content A does not contain the official name of the plan (ReArm Europe Plan/Readiness 2030) nor the specific budget amounts (€800 billion mobilized, €150 billion loan instrument) in a clear, direct way. It mentions defence budgets generally and references the plan only briefly in one result without key figures tied directly to the plan's official announcement.
b_issues: Content B does not explicitly mention the 'Readiness 2030' portion of the official name, only 'ReArm Europe Plan,' though this is still a widely used and accurate short-form name. Otherwise, figures and details are accurate and well-sourced.
reasoning: Content B directly and repeatedly provides the official name ('ReArm Europe Plan') and the two key budget figures (€800 billion in mobilized defence spending and €150 billion in loans) from multiple reliable, corroborating sources (European Commission, Reuters, DW, Euronews, FT). Content A lacks a clear statement of the plan's official name and only tangentially references the budget figures through a secondary EU Parliament source, without stating the €800 billion or €150 billion figures directly tied to the announcement. Thus B provides a more complete and accurate basis for answering the question.
